fault_hypothesis: The average throughput on line 61 is incorrectly calculated by dividing the sum of the tail by the fixed `window` size. It should instead be divided by the actual number of samples in the tail, `len(tail)`, which can be smaller than the window.

constraints.intent: The average must be the sum of tail elements divided by the actual number of tail elements.
The calculated average must fall within the range of the samples it was calculated from.
The division on the next line implicitly assumes the number of samples in the tail equals the window size.
